creator: andrew@scoop.co.nz
text:
This all looks reasonable.  if superfluous.  According to the Changelog
file in the perl module, 0.7 is a minor maintenance update which just
adds leading '_' to private methods within the class.  As such the
update doesn't really do much, but there's no reason to hold it back
other than the minor inconvenience for users of loading in the new version.

I'm no longer maintaining the application that I had been running this
module in, which is not good from a testing point of view.

Andrew


Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/p5-HTML-Breadcrumbs,

> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/120850
